article_title: Rapid Response with Ketamine on Suicidal Cognition in Resistant Depression

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine
evidence_sentences: Recent evidence suggests that a single subanesthetic dose of intravenous (IV) ketamine, a glutamate-modulating agent, acutely reduces depressive symptoms in approximately 70% of MDD patients 24 hours after infusion.

causal_tuples.subject: ketamine
causal_tuples.evidence_sentence: Recent evidence suggests that a single subanesthetic dose of intravenous (IV) ketamine, a glutamate-modulating agent, acutely reduces depressive symptoms in approximately 70% of MDD patients 24 hours after infusion.

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine
evidence_sentences: The ketamine infusion was effective in reducing the SSI scores, and the main effect of time measurement was significant, F (1.29, 33.58)=17.29, P<0.001, partial eta squared=0.4.

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine
evidence_sentences: The ketamine infusion was effective in reducing the HDRS scores, and the main effect of time measurement was significant F (2.14, 55.69)=124.65; P<0.001, partial eta squared=0.83.

causal_tuples.subject: ketamine
causal_tuples.evidence_sentence: The ketamine infusion was effective in reducing the SSI scores, and the main effect of time measurement was significant, F (1.29, 33.58)=17.29, P<0.001, partial eta squared=0.4.

causal_tuples.subject: ketamine
causal_tuples.evidence_sentence: The ketamine infusion was effective in reducing the HDRS scores, and the main effect of time measurement was significant F (2.14, 55.69)=124.65; P<0.001, partial eta squared=0.83.

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine
evidence_sentences: This study found that ketamine induced a rapid and dramatic response in ameliorating suicidal ideation in the context of MDD, which was statistically significant from minute 40 to minute 230 postinfusion but was relatively ill-sustained, with score change not being statistically significant from day 1 onward compared with baseline scores.

aggregated_relations.subject: risperidone
evidence_sentences: With regard to second-generation antipsychotic drugs, a recent controlled study found that risperidone compared to placebo significantly reduced suicidal ideation in patients with MDD; however the effects of risperidone augmentation were apparent at 2 weeks posttreatment.[21]

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine
evidence_sentences: This increased glutamate release preferentially favors AMPA receptors over NMDA receptors, because the latter are blocked by ketamine; the net effect of ketamine's antidepressant effect on a cellular level is thus an enhanced glutamatergic throughput of AMPA relative to NMDA.
